---
title: "Publications"
subtitle: "Selected peer-reviewed publications"
toc: true
toc-title: "Jump to"
---

A selection of publications grouped by theme. For the complete list, see my
[CV](cv.pdf) or [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/).

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
The entries below are drawn from my research record. Add DOIs / links as you go —
each `**Title**` line can be wrapped in a Markdown link.
:::

## Experimentation Infrastructure & Testbeds

- Hussain, A. et al. **Toward Orchestration of Complex Networking Experiments.** CSET / USENIX, 2020.
- Ardi, C. et al. **The DARPA SearchLight Dataset of Application Network Traffic.** CSET, 2022.
- Kocoloski, B. et al. **Case Studies in Experiment Design on a minimega-based Testbed.** CSET, 2021.
- Goodfellow, R. et al. **Merge: An Architecture for Interconnected Testbed Ecosystems.** 2018.
- Wroclawski, J. et al. **DETERLab and the DETER Project.** In *The GENI Book*, 2016.
- Mirkovic, J. & Benzel, T. **DeterLab: Testbed for Cybersecurity Research and Education.** 2013.
- Mirkovic, J. et al. **Reducing Allocation Errors in Network Testbeds.** IMC, 2012.
- Mirkovic, J. et al. **Automating DDoS Experimentation.** USENIX CSET, 2007.

## Measurements, Metrics & Benchmarks

- Collins, M. et al. **Identifying and Differentiating Acknowledged Scanners.** EuroS&PW, 2023.
- Tregubov, A. et al. **Modeling Cognitive Workload in Open-Source Communities via Simulation.** MABS, 2023.
- DeAngelis, G. et al. **Generating Representative Video Teleconferencing Traffic.** CSET, 2022.
- Akhtar, S. et al. **DBit: Assessing Statistically Significant Differences in CDN Performance.** Computer Networks, 2016.
- Mirkovic, J. et al. **Accurately Measuring Denial of Service in Simulation and Testbed Experiments.** IEEE TDSC, 2008.
- Mirkovic, J. et al. **Towards User-Centric Metrics for Denial-of-Service Measurement.** 2007.
- Mirkovic, J. et al. **Measuring Denial of Service.** ACM QoP, 2006.

## Reproducibility & Repeatability

- Hussain, A. et al. **Replicated Testbed Experiments for the Evaluation of DDoS Defenses.** EuroS&PW, 2020.
- Collins, M. et al. **Towards an Operations-Aware Experimentation Methodology.** EuroS&PW, 2022.
- Ardi, C. et al. **Improving Fidelity in Video Streaming Experimentation.** NDVS Workshop, 2022.
- Ardi, C. et al. **Building Reproducible Video Streaming Traffic Generators.** CSET, 2021.
- Sharma, A. et al. **Towards Repeatability and Verifiability in Networking Experiments.** JNCA, 2017.

## Cyber-Physical Systems

- Wood, P. et al. **Profiting from Attacks on Real-Time Price Communications in Smart Grids.** COMSNETS, 2017.
- Wood, P. et al. **Defending Against Strategic Adversaries in Dynamic Pricing Markets.** COMSNETS, 2016.
- Annaswamy, A. et al. **Foundations of Infrastructure CPS.** ACC, 2016.
- Wood, P. et al. **Optimizing Defensive Investments in Energy-Based CPS.** IPDPS, 2015.
- Hussain, A. et al. **Enabling Collaborative Research for Security and Resiliency of Energy CPS.** DCOSS, 2014.
- Amin, S. et al. **In Quest of Benchmarking Security Risks to Cyber-Physical Systems.** IEEE Network, 2013.

## Foundational & Early Work

- Hussain, A. et al. **Experiences with a Continuous Network Tracing Infrastructure.** ACM SIGCOMM MineNet, 2005.
- Hussain, A. et al. **A Framework for Classifying Denial of Service Attacks.** ACM SIGCOMM, 2003.
- Hussain, A. **Measurement and Spectral Analysis of Denial-of-Service Attacks.** PhD Thesis, USC, 2005.
